en.value:
1. Institutional Capacity Building
·  Design and Conduct need based ToT training for DoA officers/Junior technicians 
·  Arrange study tour for two technical government officers from DoA 
·  Support in conduction of 6 monthly meetings/workshops of inter-departmental cooperation within DoA  
·  Implement HLB/greening management programs
·  Establish Bud wood/scion certification system to produce and distribute disease free saplings.
·  Upgrade capacity of Government and private nurseries 
·  Preparation of a proposal on a sustainable Bud Wood/scion Certification system
 
2.Capacity building of Farmer Groups
·   Provide basic training to selected farmers groups on citrus production and rejuvenation technologies and GAP for citrus growing.
·  Conduct survey to identify, collect and document good practices
·  Implement local awareness and social mobilization campaign 
·  Train self-help groups, associations and cooperatives to enhance their organizational and managerial capacity.
·  Conduct Field demonstrations of proven technologies for improved citrus production and rejuvenation of declined orchard
·  Up-scale the anti-citrus decline technology (good agriculture practices)
 
3. Upgrading Monitoring and Information System
·  Establish monitoring system at district and regional level
·  Establish databases and information system at district and regional level
·  Implement Mid-term evaluation on project outcomes 
Prepare Project completion report with achievements and suggested strategies and plans to combat citrus decline.

executing_agency: Ministry of Agriculture and Livestock Development

en.full: Combating Citrus Decline Problem in Nepal

version_summary.change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API
